input:
## GOALS
- performance
Additional details: CrossFit athlete transitioning from Scaled to Rx. Preparing for 2025 CrossFit Open (8 weeks away). Need to string bar muscle-ups, increase Olympic lifts (C&J 155→175, Snatch 115→135), improve engine for longer chippers.

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- Desired training frequency: 5

### Experience
- Level: Intermediate
- Details: 2 years CrossFit, 3 years general fitness before. Competed scaled at 3 local throwdowns, placed top 10 twice. Got first bar muscle-up fall 2024. Trains Mon/Tue/Wed/Fri/Sat at 5:30 PM class.

### Equipment & Environment
- Training location: Commercial gym
- Setup details: CrossFit Riverdale affiliate - full CrossFit setup: barbells, bumper plates, rowers, Assault bikes, pull-up rigs, rings, rope, plyo boxes, GHD, kettlebells 8-70 lb, dumbbells 10-100 lb
- Available equipment: barbells, kettlebells, Dumbbells, rowers, rings, pull_up_bars

### Constraints
- Right wrist strain history (spring 2024) from high-rep overhead work. Manages with mobility and taping. Flares up with >30 snatches or >50 HSPU in single session.

reference.response:
### IDENTITY
- **Name:** Jessica Kim  
- **Age:** 29  
- **Gender:** female  
- **Experience level:** **Intermediate** — 2 years consistent CrossFit + 3 years general fitness prior; competed Scaled at 3 local throwdowns (top 10 twice); first bar muscle-up in fall 2024.

---

### GOALS
- **Primary goal(s):** **Performance (CrossFit → Rx readiness)** for **2025 CrossFit Open (8 weeks away, as of 2026-02-27)**  
  - String **bar muscle-ups** (currently can perform singles; first achieved fall 2024)  
  - Increase Olympic lifts:  
    - **Clean & Jerk:** **155 → 175 lb**  
    - **Snatch:** **115 → 135 lb**  
  - Improve “engine” for **longer chippers** (sustained mixed-modal conditioning)
- **Secondary goals:** Maintain consistency at **5 sessions/week**; manage wrist to tolerate higher-volume overhead/Oly work.
- **Target events/deadlines:** **2025 CrossFit Open — ~8 weeks out** *(date not provided; tracked relative to today)*

---

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- **Available training days:** **Mon / Tue / Wed / Fri / Sat**
- **Desired training frequency:** **5x/week**
- **Time window:** **5:30 PM class** (on training days)
- **Blocked days:** **Thu, Sun** (reason not specified)

### Equipment & Environment
- **Training location:** Commercial gym — **CrossFit Riverdale affiliate**
- **Equipment available (full CF setup):**
  - Barbells + bumper plates
  - Pull-up rigs / **pull-up bars**, **rings**
  - Rowers, **Assault bikes**
  - Rope climbs, plyo boxes, GHD
  - Kettlebells **8–70 lb**
  - Dumbbells **10–100 lb**

### Constraints
- **[ACTIVE] (since 2024-03-01, month approximate)** Right wrist strain history from high-rep overhead work  
  - **Management:** mobility + taping  
  - **Triggers:** flares with **>30 snatches** or **>50 HSPU** in a single session  
  - **Programming note:** monitor total overhead volume/intensity; prefer distributing snatch/HSPU volume across sessions when possible.

### Preferences
- **Training style:** CrossFit class-based training (group class at set time)
- **Focus areas:** bar muscle-up consistency/volume tolerance; Olympic lifting strength + technical efficiency; longer mixed-modal pacing
- **Not stated yet:** movement dislikes, communication style preferences

---

## METRICS
*(CrossFit performance prioritized; current numbers need “as of” dates—only provided contextually.)*

### Strength / Skill (CrossFit-relevant)
- **Bar Muscle-up:** first achieved **fall 2024** (currently not yet stringing; capacity unclear)  
- **Clean & Jerk:** **155 lb → goal 175 lb** *(current lift date not provided; as of 2026-02-27, date needed for validation)*  
- **Snatch:** **115 lb → goal 135 lb** *(current lift date not provided; as of 2026-02-27, date needed for validation)*

### Endurance (Engine)
- **Long chipper capacity:** improvement goal stated; **no baseline metrics provided** (e.g., row/bike paces, benchmark WOD times, HR data)

### Movement Quality / Tolerance
- **Wrist overhead volume tolerance constraint:** avoid/modify sessions exceeding **30 snatches** or **50 HSPU** (per-session threshold)

### Body Composition
- **Not provided**

---

## LOG

## 2026-02-27 — Profile created/updated (Open prep + Rx transition)
- Confirmed athlete background: 2 years CrossFit; prior general fitness 3 years; 3 scaled throwdowns (top 10 twice).
- Set primary performance goal: transition **Scaled → Rx**; prepare for **2025 CrossFit Open (~8 weeks out)**.
- Captured skill/strength targets: string bar muscle-ups; **C&J 155→175**, **Snatch 115→135**.
- Captured schedule: **Mon/Tue/Wed/Fri/Sat 5:30 PM class**, target **5x/week**.
- Logged **[ACTIVE]** right wrist strain history; identified flare thresholds and management strategy.

---

### Validation notes (data consistency checks)
- “**2025 CrossFit Open (8 weeks away)**” is **inconsistent with today’s date (2026-02-27)** unless the year is a typo or the date reference is historical.  
  - To fix: confirm whether you mean **2026 Open** (or provide the exact start date of the Open you’re targeting).
- Current lift numbers (**155 C&J, 115 Snatch**) need **dates** to be fully valid “as of” metrics.

If you reply with (1) the correct Open year/date, (2) your best recent lift dates (and whether they’re 1RM or a rep max), and (3) one or two benchmark conditioning results (e.g., Fran, Grace, 2k row, 10-min bike cals), I’ll tighten the METRICS section and make the timeline fully consistent.
